case_title: BERKWITS, ETHAN VS OK INVESTMENTS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SECOND CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFT. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE OF DENIAL SENT TO ALL PARTIES, WITH PROOF OF MAILING.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,497.00 FILED BY BERKWITS, ETHAN AS TO DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS, INC. NAIMI, HOMAYOUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-25-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-15-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERKWITS, ETHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OK INVESTMENTS, INC. NAIMI, HOMAYOUN $2,497.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,547.00, HOMAYOUN NAIMI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
